name: bullet-bridge
description: Source-available Manifest V3 browser extension for Pushbullet users.

scripts.check: npm run validate && npm test && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/options.js && node --check src/shared/api.js && node --check src/shared/config.js && node --check src/shared/context-menu.js && node --check src/shared/device-cleanup.js && node --check src/shared/mirrored-notifications.js && node --check src/shared/push-search.js && node --check src/shared/storage.js
